commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f1892a3b7ef5b6bbccdec5f1868dc9d74c5fb93b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a default-level warning before `sendCompactionNotice` returns when `params.opts?.onBlockReply` is unavailable.

PR surface: Source +9. Total +9 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection, not by live runtime reproduction: `sendCompactionNotice` returns before delivery when `params.opts?.onBlockReply` is absent, and the tests only prove user notices when that callback is supplied.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to choose whether this should land as a non-closing log-only mitigation or be expanded into the actual delivery fix.

target.title: fix(compaction): log when compaction notice is skipped due to missing block-reply stream
target.author: chengzhichao-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
